raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Energy check-in","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter — what's going on underneath that?","description":"Probes for underlying reasons behind observed lower energy and engagement.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Mentoring vision","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week, and what would you need to drop to make space for it?","description":"Explores practical aspects of integrating mentoring into their current role.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Post-refactor reflection","name":"Did the recognition for the payments refactor land properly for you, or did anything feel missing?","description":"Checks if recognition was received as intended and identifies any gaps.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future project interest","name":"What kind of project would you want to take on next quarter?","description":"Gauges interest in future projects without revealing unannounced plans.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role clarity concerns","name":"Where are things actually messy, unclear, or at risk right now?","description":"Identifies current role clarity issues or risks that need addressing.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Engagement boost","name":"What's currently slowing you down, and what part of that is within your control vs needs escalation?","description":"Identifies obstacles to engagement and differentiates between internal and external factors.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"Does the current pace feel like something you could keep up for another three months?","description":"Tests whether late hours are a sprint or the new normal.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stretch opportunities","name":"Where do you see the biggest gap between where you are now and where you want to be in 12 months?","description":"Encourages self-assessment of growth and development trajectory.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority alignment","name":"Given everything on your plate, what are you choosing to prioritise next, and what are you deprioritising?","description":"Explores how they are managing priorities post-refactor.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]}]}
